eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Otter Tail, MN; at 2:03 PM on JAN 10, 2019 Effective until 3:18 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a test of the Emergency Alert System from the Otter Tail County Sheriff's Office. This is only a test.
